personas.name: Budget-Conscious Seeker
personas.description: A user looking for affordable mental health support but frustrated by limited free content and expensive subscriptions.
goals: Access free or low-cost meditation content
Use the app regularly without financial burden
context: Using the app casually to manage stress
Exploring mental health apps as alternatives to paid therapy
constraints: Needs meaningful free content to stay engaged

personas.name: Frustrated Power User
personas.description: A frequent user who depends on the app but is hindered by crashes, bugs, and unreliable performance.
goals: Access features like downloads and offline playback
Have a smooth and reliable app experience
pain_points: Features like downloads or login not working
context: Using the app daily for meditation or sleep
Often using the app in low-connectivity environments

personas.name: Disappointed Long-Term User
personas.description: A long-time user who has seen the app decline in quality after updates and is frustrated with recent changes.
goals: Maintain a consistent and familiar user experience
Benefit from improvements without losing functionality
pain_points: Features removed or broken after updates
context: Using the app regularly over months or years
Comparing current experience with earlier versions
constraints: Relies on stable features for routine use
Low tolerance for regressions after updates

personas.name: Distrustful Subscriber
personas.description: A user who feels misled or treated unfairly due to billing practices, subscriptions, or lack of refunds.
pain_points: Poor customer support and refund policies
context: Signing up for free trials or subscriptions
constraints: Expects quick resolution of financial issues

personas.name: Satisfied Wellness User
personas.description: A user who finds the app helpful for relaxation, mindfulness, and improving mental well-being.
goals: Improve mental health and reduce stress
Use the app for sleep and relaxation
pain_points: Desire for continued improvements without losing quality
context: Using the app daily or before sleep
